fields.summary: Move ResourceRequest.clone logic everywhere into a proper API

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

fields.description: ResourceRequest.clone code is replicated in lots of places, some missing to copy one field or two due to new fields added over time. This JIRA attempts to move them into a proper API so that everyone can use this single implementation.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
